{{Quote|I'd say we use a variant on the "Erasmus" gambit. We insert 10 infiltrators aboard an Imperial supply craft. They disable the base's shields and as many guns as possible, and then hold up until relieved.|Colonel Gharon|<ref name="Minutes" />}}
'''Gharon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]. Gharon helped in planning [[Operation Cobolt]],<ref name="Minutes" /> in charge of [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltration]]<ref name="CSWE" /> of an [[Imperial orbital base]] over [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]]. He suggested that the [[Erasmus gambit]] be used in order to insert covert [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrators]] into the base.<ref name="Minutes" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Minutes of the Planning Meeting for Operation Cobolt|book=The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
